title: Matera targets expansion to United States
excerpt: Diário Campineiro explains Matera's plans to expand to the United States after leading the banking technology industry in Brazil.
body: Diário Campineiro explains Matera's plans to expand to the United States after leading the banking technology industry in Brazil. [Read here.](https://diariocampineiro.com.br/startup-da-unicamp-assume-dianteira-dos-servicos-financeiros-e-mira-os-estados-unidos/)
